description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that builds CppUTest with Conan across multiple compiler versions using a hidden .build-template. The template runs a before_script that executes `sudo pip install --upgrade conan_package_tools` and `conan user`, then a script that runs `python build.py`. Define jobs clang-3.9, clang-4.0, clang-5.0, clang-6.0, clang-7, gcc-4.9, gcc-5, gcc-6, gcc-7, and gcc-8, each inheriting the template, using the Docker images conanio/clang39, conanio/clang40, conanio/clang50, conanio/clang60, conanio/clang7, conanio/gcc49, conanio/gcc5, conanio/gcc6, conanio/gcc7, and conanio/gcc8 respectively, and setting the appropriate CONAN_CLANG_VERSIONS or CONAN_GCC_VERSIONS variable for the compiler version. All jobs share the global variables CONAN_CHANNEL, CONAN_LOGIN_USERNAME, CONAN_REFERENCE, CONAN_UPLOAD, and CONAN_USERNAME, run in the default stage, and have no special rules or artifacts.
